name: Beef Ragu
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Sauté vegetables
steps.content: Sauté all the vegetables in a large pot until aromatic and the onion is slightly golden brown.

steps.title: Add tomatoes & demi glace
steps.content: Add 3 tins of Hossen tomatoes with veal jus and demi glace into the pot and bring to a boil.

steps.title: Grill beef
steps.content: Grill all trimmed beef chuck, season with salt and pepper, then add to the pot.

steps.title: Season
steps.content: Once boiling, add all the seasoning powders and stir properly.

steps.title: Slow cook
steps.content: Lower the heat and cook the beef ragu for about 6 hours.

steps.title: Overnight in oven
steps.content: Set the oven to 86°C and put the ragu in overnight.

steps.title: Separate & blend
steps.content: Separate the pulled beef aside and hand-blend the ragu sauce until smooth.

name: Chili Paste
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil water and chili together in a big pot until totally soft.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Strain the chili and blend it.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Let the chili cool down, then keep in the chiller.

name: Harissa Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all the ingredients until smooth.

name: Dry Batter
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all ingredients in a big bowl.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Stir until well mixed and transfer into the container.

name: Beef Sausage Chorizo
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Make sure all is well mixed and portion into sous vide bags.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep inside the chiller.

name: Chicken Rosemary Sausage
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Make sure all is well mixed and portion into sous vide bags.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep inside the chiller.

name: Lamb Merguez Sausage
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Make sure all is well mixed and portion into sous vide bags.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep inside the chiller.

name: Pesto Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Mix all ingredients and blend, lastly cover with Parmesan cheese on top.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Keep individually in rectangle containers in the chiller with a label.

name: Pomodoro Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Sauté
steps.content: Sauté the diced onion and garlic.

steps.title: Boil tomato
steps.content: Add whole peeled tomato in a large pot and boil until soft.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Once soft, hand-blend until smooth.

steps.title: Reduce
steps.content: Continue to heat and reduce the sauce.

steps.title: Season
steps.content: Once thick, add all the ingredients and stir until well mixed.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Let cool and keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Ceps Stock
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil water in a large pot.

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: Once boiling, pour into a 4 L container, stir and make sure all is well mixed.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Let the stock cool and keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Garlic Aioli
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all ingredients.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Portion individually into piping bags (600 g each).

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Truffle Aioli
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe
notes: Source listed salt as '10' with no unit — assumed 10 g.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend or whisk all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Portion individually into piping bags (600 g each).

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Italian Vinaigrette
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Add to a tall jug and blend until combined.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Portion individually into piping bags (600 g each).

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Basil Oil
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all ingredients about 5 minutes until hot / smoking.

steps.title: Strain & cool
steps.content: Strain and let cool before transferring to a squeeze bottle.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Red Bell Pepper Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all ingredients.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Portion individually into rectangle containers, keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Egg Yolk Mix
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Whisk
steps.content: Mix in a mixing bowl and whisk well.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Salted Water
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil water in a large pot.

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: Once boiling, pour into a 6 L cambro, stir and make sure all is well mixed.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Once cool, label and keep at room temperature.

name: Flour Mix
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix in a mixing bowl, whisk well, and it's ready to use.

name: Garlic Confit
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Season & cover
steps.content: Separate into 3 trays, season with salt and black pepper, cover with aluminium foil.

steps.title: Bake
steps.content: Bake in the oven at 180°C for 1 hour.

steps.title: Cool
steps.content: Once done, set aside and let cool.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Strain the garlic and blend until smooth.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Portion into rectangle containers and label accordingly.

name: Tiramisu
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Egg mixture
steps.content: In a large bowl combine 30 egg yolks with 400 g sugar; whisk until pale, thick and creamy. Set aside in the chiller.

steps.title: Coffee
steps.content: Mix 2.4 L hot water with 100 g sugar and 60 g coffee powder; stir well until slightly boiling.

steps.title: Cream mixture
steps.content: Whip 1 kg cream cheese until smooth, gradually add 2 L whip cream to soft peaks, then fold in the egg-sugar mixture to keep it light.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.content: Quickly dip ladyfingers in the warm coffee syrup, layer in a tray, spread tiramisu cream, repeat finishing with cream on top.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Cover and refrigerate at least 4–5 hours (overnight is best) to let the flavours meld.

steps.title: Serve
steps.content: Before serving, dust generously with cocoa powder.

name: Alfredo Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Cook
steps.content: Weigh Parmesan powder, salt and cream into a medium pot; slow-cook until slightly thickened.

steps.title: Cool
steps.content: Once done, set aside and let cool.

name: Apricot Basil Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: In a 1/6 container weigh the apricot jam and alfredo sauce.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Stir, then finish with sliced basil; set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Teriyaki Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: In a 1/6 container weigh the teriyaki sauce and alfredo sauce; stir.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Harissa Pomodoro
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: In a 1/6 container weigh the pomodoro sauce and harissa; stir.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Corn Salsa
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Prep
steps.content: Dice the red onion, coriander leaf and jalapeño.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix everything in a large mixing bowl.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Package in suitable containers, label accordingly and keep in the chiller / freezer.

name: Roux
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Melt butter
steps.content: Slowly heat the butter until melted, then start to add the flour.

steps.title: Cook
steps.content: Stir continuously. Once done, set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Tipo Lasagna
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Prep tray
steps.content: Preheat the oven to 180°C and lightly grease a deep baking tray.

steps.title: Base layer
steps.content: Spread a thin layer of pesto béchamel at the base of the tray.

steps.title: Layer
steps.content: Arrange lasagna sheets to cover the sauce, spread béchamel, sprinkle Parmesan and mozzarella; repeat finishing with cheese on top.

steps.title: Bake covered
steps.content: Cover with foil and bake 30 minutes.

steps.title: Bake uncovered
steps.content: Remove foil and bake another 15–20 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Rest
steps.content: Rest 10 minutes to allow the layers to set.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Cut into 3 cm × 3 cm portions with straight, even cuts before serving.

name: Whipped Feta
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Temper
steps.content: Bring the cream cheese and feta to room temperature and crumble the feta.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend the cream cheese and feta until smooth and creamy.

steps.title: Add cream
steps.content: Add the cream and mix until light and spreadable.

steps.title: Sweeten & season
steps.content: Add honey and mix; season with salt and white pepper and mix well.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Taste, adjust seasoning, and chill before serving.

name: Pesto Béchamel Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe
notes: Source listed cinnamon and white pepper as '1' with no unit — assumed 1 g; bay leaf as 1 piece.

steps.title: Sauté onion
steps.content: Add yellow onion and sauté gently until soft and fragrant.

steps.title: Add roux
steps.content: Add the roux and cook briefly to combine with the onion.

steps.title: Add milk
steps.content: Gradually add milk while whisking to avoid lumps; bring to a gentle simmer.

steps.title: Aromatics
steps.content: Add the bay leaf and a pinch of cinnamon; cook until the sauce thickens.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Stir in the pesto, season with salt and white pepper, mix well, remove the bay leaf before use.

name: Bacon Bits
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Heat oil
steps.content: Heat the cooking oil in a pan over medium heat.

steps.title: Fry
steps.content: Add the beef bacon and fry until crispy and well rendered.

steps.title: Drain
steps.content: Remove and drain excess oil before use. Label accordingly.

name: Caramelised Cherry Tomatoes
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Preheat
steps.content: Preheat the combi oven to 180°C in bake mode.

steps.title: Toss
steps.content: Toss the cherry tomatoes with pomace oil, salt, black pepper and honey.

steps.title: Bake
steps.content: Spread on a tray and bake 5–7 minutes until caramelised and slightly blistered.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Once cool, transfer to a container and label accordingly.

name: Lemon Capers Aioli
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Place mayonnaise, capers, lemon juice and salt in a jug; blend until smooth and fine.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Taste and adjust seasoning before serving. Label accordingly.

name: Oil Mixture
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine herbs
steps.content: In a small bowl combine the chopped basil, parsley and chilli flakes.

steps.title: Add parmesan
steps.content: Add the Parmesan powder and mix evenly.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Drizzle in the balsamic glaze and stir gently to combine. Label accordingly.

name: Pasta Cooking Times (Reference)
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe
notes: Reference card — boiling times by pasta shape (no ingredients).

steps.title: Mafalde
steps.content: Mafalde — 6 minutes.

steps.title: Gemelli
steps.content: Gemelli — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Conchiglie
steps.content: Conchiglie — 4 minutes.

steps.title: Fusilli
steps.content: Fusilli — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Fettuccine
steps.content: Fettuccine — 2 minutes.

steps.title: Linguine
steps.content: Linguine — 3 minutes.

steps.title: Creste
steps.content: Creste — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Radiatori
steps.content: Radiatori — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Campanelle
steps.content: Campanelle — 5 minutes.

name: Truffle Tramezzini
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Slice
steps.content: Slice the brioche loaf into 2 cm slices and trim the edges.

steps.title: Butter
steps.content: Spread 10 g Planta evenly on one side of each brioche slice.

steps.title: Fill
steps.content: Spread truffle aioli, add mozzarella (1 slice each side), then 10 g beef bacon.

steps.title: Wrap
steps.content: Close with the second slice, buttered sides facing outward, press gently and cling-wrap individually. Label before chilling.

steps.title: Toast
steps.content: Trim the bread sides, cut into triangle tramezzini, then toast in the oven at 180°C for 4 minutes until golden brown.
